A '''Bomat''' was a carnivorous creature native to [[Aruza/Legends|Aruza]]. Considered a pest, they were attracted to gobbets of flesh.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Payback: The Tale of Dengar|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1stm}}
